rules.h1: text-6xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-display_sans uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Exposed skeletons, brutalist geometry, no curves.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid border-border_muted. Cards should have right and bottom borders, simulating a continuous grid.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: MODE A for Landing Page (Asymmetry, huge spans). MODE B for POS Page (Control Room density, tight gaps).

surface_strategies.landing_page: Grid Borders combined with Kinetic Textures (Marquee). Cards should have absolute-positioned '+' or 'L' brackets in corners. Overlays on images max bg-black/50.
surface_strategies.pos_page: Retro-Futurism (Terminal Look). Pitch black background, sharp #FF3B00 or white borders, dense monochrome data tables.

components.buttons: Flat rectangles. Default: bg-transparent border border-[#FF3B00] text-[#FF3B00]. Hover: bg-[#FF3B00] text-black. Transition: all 0.2s ease-out.
components.cards: border-collapse style. border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950/50 p-6. Must include decorative brackets [ ] or + in corners.
components.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. Massive outline text (text-8xl text-transparent border-white stroke-white font-display_sans).
components.navigation: Sticky, solid background bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-md with sharp bottom border border-zinc-800. Monospace links.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark industrial brutalist texture, metallic grid, subtle glowing orange neon accents

pos_background.description: Raw concrete wall with a subtle orange glowing strip light, brutalist architecture

event_crowd_1.description: people in front of stage with orange lighting

event_crowd_2.description: people gathering in a concert, underground feel

dj_1.description: man playing audio mixer on stage, dark club

dj_2.description: silhouette of people inside room, techno dj

poster_1.description: a crowd of people in a dark room

instructions_to_main_agent: Load JetBrains Mono, Anton, and Silkscreen fonts from Google Fonts.
Do NOT use any border-radius. Everything must be strictly rounded-none to match the brutalist aesthetic.
Create a 'Corner Bracket' decorative UI piece (e.g. absolute positioning of '+' signs, brackets '[' ']', or L-shapes at the corners of cards/sections) to match the Teletech vibe.
Main Landing Page must include a Marquee with massive outline text, an events grid, and bold, high-contrast imagery.
Hero sections should overlay text heavily on desaturated, dark, gritty backgrounds.

POS Page has two states: 1) A PIN entry gate featuring a brutal keypad interface over the 'pos_background' image. 2) The dashboard itself which should look extremely dense, terminal-like (Control Room Grid), utilizing JetBrains Mono heavily, sharp lines, orange and white text on black.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
